name: AZ Environmental Contracting Inc
description: Mold inspection services along with fire emergency, mold removal, fire and water damage restoration. BBB accredited.

name: MSE Environmental
description: Thorough mold inspections, asbestos testing, lead testing, sewage/bacteria testing, water damage consulting, indoor air quality testing. 24/7 environmental testing for residential and commercial sectors.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Why People love working with MSE Environmental!

sentiment.summary: MSE Environmental has a strong positive reputation with customers who appreciate their professional service and environmental expertise.

name: Mold Inspection Sciences
description: Provides mold testing, inspection, detection, mold-related illness (CIRS) inspection, remediation protocols, post-remediation clearance testing, and environmental risk assessments. Serves Phoenix-Scottsdale-Mesa, Tucson, Sedona, Prescott, Flagstaff.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: If there were than 5 stars I would Joseph- I would!SO thorough, SO patient, SO nice, MUCH integrity
From the very first phone call, their customer service was impeccable-- friendly, responsive, and informative.
He was extremely professional and thorough. What really stood out was how willing and happy he was to answer all of our questions.
Frank did a wonderful job! I'd give him an 11 out of 10 rating if I could!

sentiment.summary: Mold Inspection Sciences has an exceptional reputation with overwhelmingly positive reviews praising their professionalism, expertise, thorough inspections, and outstanding customer service across all interactions.

name: Mold Test Company
description: Board-certified mold inspectors trained to identify suspect mold and bacteria using accredited laboratories. Services the entire state of Arizona including Chandler, Mesa, Phoenix, Scottsdale, and Tucson.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: They were the most thorough company of the 5 that we contacted.
He told us he would treat the home as if it was his own. And he did!
Great service and informative. Went above and beyond.
The technician showed tremendous respect upon realizing I was a Vietnam era vet.

sentiment.summary: Mold Test Company receives overwhelmingly positive reviews praising their thoroughness, professionalism, respect, and commitment to solving customers' mold and air quality issues with exceptional service.

name: MoldGone
description: Mold inspection, detection, and removal services in Phoenix, Scottsdale, Mesa, Surprise, Cave Creek, and Maricopa County.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: I couldn't be happier!! The final results of the remediation were far and beyond what I expected.
His customer service skills and knowledge go above and beyond. I highly recommend Jarrett at Mold Gone.
My anxiety level went from 10 to 0 within the first 5 minutes of the initial call.
Mold Gone fixed my mold issue, no demo, and did thorough testing very quickly for a reasonable price.

sentiment.summary: MoldGone receives overwhelmingly positive sentiment with exceptional praise for professionalism, expertise, customer service, and reasonable pricing, with particular recognition of technician Jarrett's outstanding performance across all reviews.

name: Phoenix Mold Inspection & Testing
description: Unbiased mold testing with air and surface sample collection to determine presence and source of indoor mold growth. Provides detailed protocols for mold removal.

sentiment.label: mixed

sentiment.summary: Unable to assess sentiment: reviews contain only emoji prompts with no actual customer feedback or ratings provided.
